name: mediinsight
description: Converts public cosmetic customer signals into evidence-backed reports, Instagram assets, and ad compliance review.

interface.shortDescription: Public review insight and cosmetic ad QA for Meditherapy.
interface.longDescription: MediInsight collects public customer voice from distributed cosmetic sales channels, builds evidence-backed insight reports, generates Instagram-ready 4-cut content drafts, and reviews generated copy against cosmetic advertising risk rules with optional Korean Law MCP support.
defaultPrompt: Create a Meditherapy insight report from these URLs.
Generate Instagram carousel drafts and compliance QA.
Review this cosmetic ad copy for risky claims.
